# attractor-cli

`pas` binary crate. Entry point at `main.rs` parses `Cli` args via `clap` derive macros, initializes `tracing_subscriber`, dispatches to `commands/` handlers for pipeline execution, validation, generation.

## Contents

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) - Package manifest. Defines `[[bin]] name = "pas"`, `src/main.rs` entry, workspace dependencies (`attractor-types`, `attractor-dot`, `attractor-llm`, `attractor-agent`, `attractor-pipeline`, `attractor-tools`, `clap`, `tokio`, `anyhow`, `tracing`, `tracing-subscriber`, `serde`).
- [src/main.rs](./src/main.rs) - `Cli` struct with `#[command(name = "pas")]`, `Commands` enum (8 variants: `Run`, `Validate`, `Info`, `Plan`, `Decompose`, `Scaffold`, `Generate`, `Launch`), `tokio::main` async dispatch, `load_pipeline` helper wrapping `attractor_dot::parse`.
- [src/commands/mod.rs](./src/commands/mod.rs) - Barrel re-export. Exposes `cmd_run`, `cmd_run_dir`, `cmd_validate`, `cmd_info`, `cmd_plan`, `cmd_decompose`, `validate_decomposition`, `cmd_scaffold`, `cmd_generate`, `cmd_generate_dir`, `cmd_launch`.
- [src/commands/run.rs](./src/commands/run.rs) - `cmd_run` executes single DOT pipeline, `cmd_run_dir` executes directory of DOT files (lexical sort).
- [src/commands/validate.rs](./src/commands/validate.rs) - `cmd_validate` handler.
- [src/commands/info.rs](./src/commands/info.rs) - `cmd_info` handler.
- [src/commands/plan.rs](./src/commands/plan.rs) - `cmd_plan` handler. Generates PRD/spec documents.
- [src/commands/decompose.rs](./src/commands/decompose.rs) - `cmd_decompose` handler, `validate_decomposition` for epic validation.
- [src/commands/scaffold.rs](./src/commands/scaffold.rs) - `cmd_scaffold` handler. Creates pipeline DOT from epic.
- [src/commands/generate.rs](./src/commands/generate.rs) - `cmd_generate` handler, `cmd_generate_dir` batch handler. Converts specs to DOT pipelines.
- [src/commands/launch.rs](./src/commands/launch.rs) - `cmd_launch` handler. Executes from docs directory.

## Stack

- `tokio` - Async runtime (`#[tokio::main]`).
- `clap` - CLI parsing (`#[derive(Parser)]`, `#[derive(Subcommand)]`, `#[arg()]`).
- `anyhow` - Error handling (`anyhow::Result`).
- `tracing` / `tracing-subscriber` - Logging initialization (`tracing_subscriber::fmt::init()`).
- `serde` - Serialization support.
- `attractor-pipeline` - `PipelineGraph` execution engine.
- `attractor-dot` - DOT file parsing (`parse` function).
- `attractor-llm` - LLM provider clients.
- `attractor-agent` - Agent loop and subagent logic.
- `attractor-tools` - Tool execution framework.

## Patterns

- **Command Dispatch**: `main()` matches `Commands` enum variants, dispatches to `cmd_*` functions in `commands/` subdirectory. Directory vs file detection via `std::fs::metadata`.
- **Derive Macros**: `Cli` uses `#[command(name = "pas", version)]`. `Commands` uses doc comments for `--help` text.
- **Pipeline Loading**: `load_pipeline` helper reads DOT file path, calls `attractor_dot::parse`, constructs `attractor_pipeline::PipelineGraph`.
- **Positional Resolution**: `Generate` command resolves `SPEC` arg, `PRD SPEC` args, or `--prd`/`--spec` flags before handler dispatch.

## Behavioral Contracts

- **CLI name**: `pas` (from `#[command(name = "pas")]`).
- **Global flags**: `--verbose` sets `tracing` level "debug" (default "info").
- **File patterns**: `*.dot` for `Run` command; `*-spec.md` paired with `*-prd.md` (stem replacement logic) for `Generate`/`Launch` directory modes.
- **Lexical sorting**: `cmd_run_dir` sorts `.dot` files lexically (zero-pad recommended: `phase-01.dot` before `phase-11.dot`).
- **Default paths**:
  - Logs: `.pas/logs/{pipeline}-{hash:08x}` (hash computed via `DefaultHasher` on canonical path).
  - Generate output: `pipelines/{spec-stem}.dot`.
  - Scaffold output: `pipelines/{epic-id}.dot`.
  - Plan output: `.pas/prd.md` or `.pas/spec.md`.
- **Execution limits**: `max_steps` default `200`; `max_budget_usd` optional float cap.
- **Checkpointing**: Auto-resume from checkpoints unless `--fresh` flag passed. Checkpoints managed via `attractor_pipeline` per-node.

## File Relationships

- `main.rs` imports handlers from `commands/` module (via `mod commands;`).
- `main.rs` constructs `PipelineGraph` via `load_pipeline` helper using `attractor_dot::parse`.
- `commands/` handlers import from sibling crates: `attractor_pipeline`, `attractor_dot`, `attractor_llm`, `attractor_agent`, `attractor_tools`, `attractor_types`.
- `Cargo.toml` declares all workspace crate dependencies.
